sigWerErrors.reason: The extra word '润' at the beginning does not make sense in this context and makes the sentence confusing.
Replacing '你' (you) with '润' (run/moist) changes the subject and makes the sentence incoherent.
'等' (wait) and '当' (when/serve as) have different meanings, but the overall intent of waiting for a new card is still somewhat understandable.
